name: StrandUnbondingData
summary: The StrandUnbondingData class represents the unbonding of a rebar strand.

constructors.name: StrandUnbondingData
constructors.summary: Initializes a new strand unbonding data instance with empty attributes.

properties.name: FromEnd
properties.summary: The unbonding from the end of the strand.

properties.name: FromStart
properties.summary: The unbonding from the start of the strand.

properties.name: MiddleToEnd
properties.summary: The unbonding from the middle of the strand to the end of the strand.

properties.name: MiddleToStart
properties.summary: The unbonding from the middle of the strand to the start of the strand.
